diff:
diff --git a/docs/adr/0002-frontend-must-not-import-db.md b/docs/adr/0002-frontend-must-not-import-db.md
--- a/docs/adr/0002-frontend-must-not-import-db.md
+++ b/docs/adr/0002-frontend-must-not-import-db.md
@@ -7,5 +7,6 @@ Frontend/ui files must not import db directly.
 ## Decision
 Files under frontend/ or ui/ must not import from db/ directly.
+Frontend data loading should continue to use API boundaries.
 
 ## Consequences
